infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SiteSync needs camera access to document construction site progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SiteSync uses location to geotag construction site photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SiteSync saves photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SiteSync to use location for geotagging photos.
